pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: false
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  editor: visual
  theme:
    light: flatly
  smooth-scroll: true
  theme-toggle: true
  page-layout: full
